title: User Context
description: Create a UserContext to share user authentication status across different mobile screens.
problemStatement:
Global state! Create a `UserContext` using `createContext()`. Export a `UserProvider` component that wraps its children with `UserContext.Provider`.

**Requirement:** Pass a literal object `{ name: 'ProglyUser' }` as the `value` prop.
hints: Context is essential in mobile apps for sharing logged-in status or app-wide settings.
expectedOutput: A context provider exported along with its context object
